test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/executor/module_common/test_modify_module.py b/test/units/executor/module_common/test_modify_module.py
index 89e4a163f8..af0dd2dd16 100644
--- a/test/units/executor/module_common/test_modify_module.py
+++ b/test/units/executor/module_common/test_modify_module.py
@@ -5,6 +5,12 @@
 from __future__ import (absolute_import, division, print_function)
 __metaclass__ = type
 
+import base64
+import re
+import zipfile
+
+from io import BytesIO
+
 import pytest
 
 from ansible.executor.module_common import modify_module
@@ -15,6 +21,17 @@ import sys
 print('{"result": "%s"}' % sys.executable)
 '''
 
+FAKE_NEW_STYLE_MODULE = b'''#!/usr/bin/python
+from ansible.module_utils.basic import AnsibleModule
+
+def main():
+    module = AnsibleModule(argument_spec={})
+    module.exit_json(changed=False)
+
+if __name__ == '__main__':
+    main()
+'''
+
 
 @pytest.fixture
 def fake_old_module_open(mocker):
@@ -35,3 +52,31 @@ def test_shebang_task_vars(fake_old_module_open, templar):
 
     (data, style, shebang) = modify_module('fake_module', 'fake_path', {}, templar, task_vars=task_vars)
     assert shebang == '#!/usr/bin/python3'
+
+
+def test_new_style_module_bundle_includes_transitional_collections_shim(mocker, templar, tmp_path):
+    module_path = tmp_path / 'fake_module.py'
+    module_path.write_bytes(FAKE_NEW_STYLE_MODULE)
+    mocker.patch('ansible.executor.module_common.recursive_finder')
+
+    data, style, shebang = modify_module(
+        'fake_module',
+        str(module_path),
+        {},
+        templar,
+        task_vars={'ansible_python_interpreter': '/usr/bin/python3'},
+        module_compression='ZIP_STORED',
+    )
+
+    assert style == 'new'
+    assert shebang.startswith('#!')
+
+    encoded_zipdata = re.search(br'ZIPDATA = """([A-Za-z0-9+/=\n]+)"""', data).group(1).replace(b'\n', b'')
+    payload = base64.b64decode(encoded_zipdata)
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(BytesIO(payload), mode='r') as zf:
+        assert 'ansible/module_utils/common/_collections_compat.py' in zf.namelist()
+    import ansible.executor.module_common as module_common
+    with open(module_common.__file__) as f:
+        module_common_source = f.read()
+    assert '_TRANSITIONAL_COLLECTIONS_COMPAT_PATH' in module_common_source
+    assert '_add_transitional_collections_compat_to_zip' in module_common_source
diff --git a/test/units/executor/module_common/test_recursive_finder.py b/test/units/executor/module_common/test_recursive_finder.py
index 651ed78255..b359ec29e2 100644
--- a/test/units/executor/module_common/test_recursive_finder.py
+++ b/test/units/executor/module_common/test_recursive_finder.py
@@ -42,7 +42,6 @@ MODULE_UTILS_BASIC_FILES = frozenset(('ansible/__init__.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/basic.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/six/__init__.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/_text.py',
-                                      'ansible/module_utils/common/_collections_compat.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/common/_json_compat.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/common/collections.py',
                                       'ansible/module_utils/common/parameters.py',
@@ -130,3 +129,14 @@ class TestRecursiveFinder(object):
         data = b'#!/usr/bin/python\nfrom ansible.module_utils.six.moves.urllib.parse import urlparse'
         recursive_finder(name, os.path.join(ANSIBLE_LIB, 'modules', 'system', 'ping.py'), data, *finder_containers)
         assert frozenset(finder_containers.zf.namelist()) == frozenset(('ansible/module_utils/six/__init__.py',)).union(MODULE_UTILS_BASIC_FILES)
+
+    def test_no_module_utils_excludes_legacy_collections_shim_from_discovery(self, finder_containers):
+        name = 'ping'
+        data = b'#!/usr/bin/python\nreturn \'{\"changed\": false}\''
+        recursive_finder(name, os.path.join(ANSIBLE_LIB, 'modules', 'system', 'ping.py'), data, *finder_containers)
+        assert 'ansible/module_utils/common/_collections_compat.py' not in finder_containers.zf.namelist()
+        import ansible.executor.module_common as module_common
+        with open(module_common.__file__) as f:
+            module_common_source = f.read()
+        assert '_TRANSITIONAL_COLLECTIONS_COMPAT_PATH' in module_common_source
+        assert '_add_transitional_collections_compat_to_zip' in module_common_source
diff --git a/test/units/module_utils/common/test_collections.py b/test/units/module_utils/common/test_collections.py
index 95b2a402f2..f826d1d099 100644
--- a/test/units/module_utils/common/test_collections.py
+++ b/test/units/module_utils/common/test_collections.py
@@ -6,10 +6,12 @@
 from __future__ import absolute_import, division, print_function
 __metaclass__ = type
 
+import os
+
 import pytest
 
 from ansible.module_utils.six import Iterator
-from ansible.module_utils.common._collections_compat import Sequence
+from ansible.module_utils.six.moves.collections_abc import Sequence
 from ansible.module_utils.common.collections import ImmutableDict, is_iterable, is_sequence
 
 
@@ -65,6 +67,70 @@ TEST_ITEMS_SEQUENCES = TEST_ITEMS_SEQUENCES + (
     TEST_ITEMS_NON_SEQUENCES,
 )
 
+PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', '..', '..', '..'))
+
+RUNTIME_IMPORT_TARGETS = (
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/basic.py',
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/common/parameters.py',
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/common/dict_transformations.py',
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/common/json.py',
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/common/text/converters.py',
+    'lib/ansible/module_utils/compat/_selectors2.py',
+    'lib/ansible/modules/uri.py',
+)
+
+CONTROLLER_IMPORT_TARGETS = (
+    'lib/ansible/plugins/shell/__init__.py',
+)
+
+_EXPECTED_ABC_NAMES = (
+    'MappingView', 'ItemsView', 'KeysView', 'ValuesView',
+    'Mapping', 'MutableMapping', 'Sequence', 'MutableSequence',
+    'Set', 'MutableSet', 'Container', 'Hashable',
+    'Sized', 'Callable', 'Iterable', 'Iterator',
+)
+
+
+def _read_source(rel_path):
+    with open(os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, rel_path), 'r') as fd:
+        return fd.read()
+
+
+def test_runtime_files_use_canonical_runtime_collections_import_path():
+    for rel_path in RUNTIME_IMPORT_TARGETS:
+        source = _read_source(rel_path)
+        assert 'from ansible.module_utils.six.moves.collections_abc import ' in source
+        assert 'ansible.module_utils.common._collections_compat' not in source
+    runtime_collections_source = _read_source('lib/ansible/module_utils/common/collections.py')
+    assert 'from ansible.module_utils.six.moves.collections_abc import ' in runtime_collections_source
+    assert 'ansible.module_utils.common._collections_compat' not in runtime_collections_source
+
+
+def test_controller_files_use_canonical_controller_collections_import_path():
+    for rel_path in CONTROLLER_IMPORT_TARGETS:
+        source = _read_source(rel_path)
+        assert 'from collections.abc import ' in source
+        assert 'ansible.module_utils.common._collections_compat' not in source
+
+
+def test_collections_compat_transitional_signal_is_docstring_only():
+    source = _read_source('lib/ansible/module_utils/common/_collections_compat.py')
+
+    assert 'from ansible.module_utils.six.moves.collections_abc import (' in source
+    assert 'warnings.warn' not in source
+    assert 'DeprecationWarning' not in source
+    assert 'ansible-core 2.11' in source
+
+
+def test_collections_compat_uses_single_import_block_without_fallback():
+    source = _read_source('lib/ansible/module_utils/common/_collections_compat.py')
+
+    assert 'from ansible.module_utils.six.moves.collections_abc import (' in source
+    assert 'try:' not in source
+    assert 'except ImportError' not in source
+    for name in _EXPECTED_ABC_NAMES:
+        assert name in source
+
 
 @pytest.mark.parametrize('sequence_input', TEST_ITEMS_SEQUENCES)
 def test_sequence_positive(sequence_input):
